instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul, a slave of Christ Jesus, a called apostle, separated unto the gospel of God,
output: Pablo, esclavo de Cristo Jesús, apóstol llamado, apartado para el evangelio de Dios,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which He promised beforehand through His prophets in the holy Scriptures,
output: que Él había prometido antes por medio de Sus profetas en las santas Escrituras,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Concerning His Son, who came out of the seed of David according to the flesh,
output: acerca de Su Hijo, que era del linaje de David según la carne,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who was designated the Son of God in power according to the Spirit of holiness out of the resurrection of the dead, Jesus Christ our Lord;
output: que fue designado Hijo de Dios en poder, según el Espíritu de santidad, por la resurrección de entre los muertos, Jesucristo nuestro Señor,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Through whom we have received grace and apostleship unto the obedience of faith among all the Gentiles on behalf of His name,
output: y por quien hemos recibido la gracia y el apostolado, para la obediencia de la fe entre todos los gentiles por causa de Su nombre;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Among whom you also are the called ones of Jesus Christ;
output: entre los cuales estáis también vosotros, los llamados de Jesucristo;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To all who are in Rome, beloved of God, the called saints: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
output: a todos los que estáis en Roma, amados de Dios, los santos llamados: Gracia y paz a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre y del Señor Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: First, I thank my God through Jesus Christ for you all because your faith is proclaimed throughout the whole world.
output: Primeramente doy gracias a mi Dios mediante Jesucristo con respecto a todos vosotros, porque vuestra fe se proclama por todo el mundo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For God is my witness, whom I serve in my spirit in the gospel of His Son, how unceasingly I make mention of you always in my prayers,
output: Porque testigo me es Dios, a quien sirvo en mi espíritu en el evangelio de Su Hijo, de que sin cesar hago mención de vosotros siempre en mis oraciones,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Beseeching if by any means now at last I may be prospered in the will of God to come to you.
output: rogando que de alguna manera ahora, al fin, Dios me favorezca en Su voluntad concediéndome ir a vosotros.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For I long to see you that I may impart to you some spiritual gift so that you may be established;
output: Porque anhelo veros, para comunicaros algún don espiritual, a fin de que seáis confirmados;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That is, that I with you may be encouraged among you through the faith which is in one another, both yours and mine.
output: esto es, para ser mutuamente animados por la fe que está en vosotros y en mí, la fe que es vuestra y mía.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And I do not want you to be ignorant, brothers, that often I purposed to come to you (yet have been hindered until the present), that I might have some fruit among you also, even as among the rest of the Gentiles.
output: Pero no quiero, hermanos, que ignoréis que muchas veces me he propuesto ir a vosotros (pero hasta ahora he sido estorbado), para tener también entre vosotros algún fruto, como entre los demás gentiles.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I am debtor both to Greeks and to barbarians, both to wise and to foolish;
output: Deudor soy igualmente a griegos y a bárbaros, a sabios y a ignorantes.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: So, for my part, I am ready to announce the gospel to you also who are in Rome.
output: Así que, en cuanto a mí, pronto estoy a anunciaros el evangelio también a vosotros que estáis en Roma.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God unto salvation to everyone who believes, both to Jew first and to Greek.
output: Porque no me avergüenzo del evangelio, porque es poder de Dios para salvación a todo aquel que cree; al judío primeramente, y también al griego.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For the righteousness of God is revealed in it out of faith to faith, as it is written, “But the righteous one shall have life and live by faith.”
output: Porque en el evangelio la justicia de Dios se revela por fe y para fe, como está escrito: “Mas el justo por la fe tendrá vida y vivirá”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For the wrath of God is revealed from heaven upon all ungodliness and unrighteousness of men who hold down the truth in unrighteousness,
output: Porque la ira de Dios se revela desde el cielo contra toda impiedad e injusticia de los hombres que reprimen la verdad con la injusticia;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because that which is known of God is manifest within them, for God manifested it to them.
output: porque lo que de Dios se conoce es manifiesto en ellos, pues Dios se lo manifestó.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For the invisible things of Him, both His eternal power and divine characteristics, have been clearly seen since the creation of the world, being perceived by the things made, so that they would be without excuse;
output: Porque las cosas invisibles de Él, Su eterno poder y características divinas, se han visto con toda claridad desde la creación del mundo, siendo percibidas por medio de las cosas hechas, de modo que no tienen excusa.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because though they knew God, they did not glorify Him as God or thank Him, but rather became vain in their reasonings, and their heart, lacking understanding, was darkened.
output: Pues habiendo conocido a Dios, no le glorificaron como a Dios, ni le dieron gracias, sino que se envanecieron en sus razonamientos, y su corazón, falto de entendimiento, fue entenebrecido.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Professing to be wise, they became fools
output: Profesando ser sabios, se hicieron necios,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And changed the glory of the incorruptible God into the likeness of an image of corruptible man and of birds and four-footed animals and reptiles.
output: y cambiaron la gloria del Dios incorruptible en semejanza de imagen de hombre corruptible, de aves, de cuadrúpedos y de reptiles.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Therefore God gave them up in the lusts of their hearts to uncleanness, so that they dishonor their bodies among themselves,
output: Por lo cual también Dios los entregó a la inmundicia, en las concupiscencias de sus corazones, de modo que deshonran entre sí sus propios cuerpos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who exchanged the truth of God for the lie, and worshipped and served the creation rather than the Creator, who is blessed forever. Amen.
output: Ellos cambiaron la verdad de Dios por la mentira, adorando y sirviendo a las criaturas antes que al Creador, el cual es bendito por los siglos. Amén.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Therefore God gave them up to passions of dishonor; for their females exchanged the natural use for that which is contrary to nature;
output: Por esto Dios los entregó a pasiones deshonrosas; pues sus mujeres cambiaron el uso natural por el que es contra naturaleza,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And likewise also the males, leaving the natural use of the female, burned in their craving toward one another, males with males committing unseemliness and fully receiving in themselves the retribution of their error which was due.
output: y de igual modo también los hombres, dejando el uso natural de la mujer, se encendieron en su lascivia unos con otros, cometiendo hechos impropios hombres con hombres, y recibiendo en sí mismos la retribución debida a su extravío.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And even as they did not approve of holding God in their full knowledge, God gave them up to a disapproved mind, to do the things which are not fitting,
output: Y como ellos no aprobaron tener en su pleno conocimiento a Dios, Dios los entregó a una mente reprobada, para hacer cosas que no convienen;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Being filled with all unrighteousness, wickedness, covetousness, malice; full of envy, murder, strife, deceit, malignity;
output: estando atestados de toda injusticia, maldad, codicia, malicia; llenos de envidia, homicidios, contiendas, engaños y malignidades;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Whisperers, slanderers, hateful to God, insolent, arrogant, boasters, inventors of evil things, disobedient to parents,
output: murmuradores, calumniadores, aborrecedores de Dios, insolentes, soberbios, jactanciosos, inventores de males, desobedientes a los padres,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Senseless, faithless, affectionless, merciless;
output: necios, desleales, sin afecto natural, sin misericordia;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who, though fully knowing the righteous judgment of God, that those who practice such things are worthy of death, not only do them, but also have fellow delight in those who practice them.
output: quienes, a pesar de conocer bien el justo juicio de Dios, que los que practican tales cosas son dignos de muerte, no sólo las hacen, sino que también se complacen con los que las practican.
